message:
fix: Add MatMul (@=) handling to augmented assignment

Previously, using @= operator would hit unreachable because MatMul
was not in SimpleOpStrings. Added explicit handling for MatMul at:
- self.attr @= value (calls attr.__imatmul__)
- list[i] @= value (calls element.__imatmul__)
- target @= value (calls target.__imatmul__)

Also added compile error for @= and **= on dynamic dict attributes
since those don't support matrix/pow operations.
